RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: Prognoz is the name of the once soviet Earth research artificial satellites (ISZ for Russian) meant to study processes of solar activity, their influence on interplanetary environment and the Earth magnetosphere.

InformationURL.Name: Prognoz spacecraft mission overview
InformationURL.Description: Historical mission overview of Prognoz missions at IKI website

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
